source_quote: FunSearch and DeepSeek-Prover use a formal or numeric checker to rank candidates and control search within a formalized computational task.

evidence_and_evaluator: Natural-language proof review by LLM and humans
decision_role_and_feedback: Diagnostic or terminal assessment; sequential revision
source_quote: Aletheia produces natural-language proofs reviewed by LLM and human judgment; of 200 audited Erdos solutions only 13 (6.5 percent) were rated meaningfully correct.

evidence_and_evaluator: Observed or simulated data with statistical fit
decision_role_and_feedback: Diagnostic or ranking; no cross-problem update
source_quote: AI Feynman and symbolic-model discovery fit equations to data with deterministic search and no memory transfer across problems.

decision_role_and_feedback: Ranking and search control; partial physical feedback
source_quote: ChemCrow and ChemReasoner use computational proxy signals; physical characterization such as NMR and MS remains a separate wet-lab boundary.

evidence_and_evaluator: DFT relaxation and GNN stability prediction
source_quote: GNoME uses DFT-in-the-loop active learning for computational phase-stability screening; DFT approximates physical energies and predictions still require synthesis and characterization.

evidence_and_evaluator: Protocol artifact review; evaluator incompletely reported
source_quote: BioPlanner generates protocols, but the source does not establish a validator channel that independently tracks biological validity or closes a physical experiment loop.

evidence_and_evaluator: Statistical test on experimental or simulated behavior
source_quote: Automated-social-science and LLM-simulation studies use statistical tests, but shared generator and subject models can make the signal measure self-consistency rather than an external fact.
AutoML-Zero, algorithm discovery, and AutoKernel feed executable benchmark results into evolutionary or LLM-guided search; this does not resolve interpretability.
